title: Repair ephemeral ARM builder SSH readiness
description: Two consecutive scripts/ec2-claude.sh launches using known AMI ami-0f67ee33b59cb8565 started tagged c7g.xlarge instances and attached the LICHEN EBS volume, but strict SSH never became available within 180 seconds. Instances i-06b59e258e4170e46 and i-0fca8f23e46ab4d06 were cleaned up. Diagnose security-group ingress, key injection/EC2 Instance Connect, sshd/cloud-init, and readiness timeout behavior so Zephyr cross-build validation can run safely.
acceptance_criteria: A fresh tagged ARM builder from the configured AMI accepts strict non-interactive SSH with independently verified identity, mounts/unmounts the EBS volume, runs a smoke command, and cleans up instance/SG/queue with volume available; regression test or launcher diagnostics identify future failures.
